title: Use Case Schema
description: Schema for detailed use cases that describe real-world scenarios showing system behavior before and after implementation

title.description: Descriptive title for the use case

summary.description: Brief summary of what this use case demonstrates

primaryActor.description: The main user/system that initiates this use case

secondaryActors.description: Other actors involved in this use case

preconditions.description: Conditions that must be true before the use case begins

trigger.description: Event or action that initiates this use case

context.description: The situational context (e.g., 'Hospital has complex policy rules')

impact.description: The positive impact or benefit achieved

mainFlow.description: Numbered sequence of steps in the main/happy path

alternativeFlows.description: Alternative paths through the use case

branchPoint.description: Where this flow branches from main flow

postconditions.description: Conditions that must be true after successful completion

businessRules.description: Business rules that apply to this use case

relatedRequirements.description: Requirement IDs that this use case addresses

relatedEpic.description: Epic ID this use case belongs to

relatedStories.description: Story IDs that implement this use case

sourceDocument.description: Reference to source document if extracted from existing documentation
